args.name: address

result.name: found
result.desc: Whether a device responded at the specified address.

args.name: address
args.desc: I2C address of the device to write to.

args.name: reg_address

args.name: length
args.desc: Number of bytes to write.

args.desc: Data bytes to write to the register.

args.name: address
args.desc: I2C address of the device to read from.

args.name: reg_address
args.desc: Register address to read from.

args.name: length
args.desc: Number of bytes to read.

result.name: data
result.desc: Read data bytes (of specified length).

i2c.desc: Reads a sequence of bytes from a register of an I2C device.

result.name: acceleration
result.desc: Acceleration vector in m/s^2 (x, y, z).

imu.desc: Gets the current acceleration vector from the IMU.

result.name: angular_velocity
result.desc: Angular velocity vector in rad/s (x, y, z).

imu.desc: Gets the current angular velocity vector from the IMU.

result.name: down_vector
result.desc: Down vector (unit vector pointing in the direction of gravity).

result.name: orientation
result.desc: Rotation vector representing the robot's orientation (Euler rotation in radians, XYZ order)

imu.desc: Gets the current orientation of the robot as a rotation vector (axis-angle representation).

result.name: state
result.desc: Calibration state (0 = not calibrated, 1 = calibrating, 2 = calibrated).

imu.desc: Gets the current calibration state of the IMU.

result.name: data
result.desc: Calibration data blob (format TBD).

imu.desc: Gets the current calibration data of the IMU.

args.name: data
args.desc: Calibration data blob (format TBD).

Starts the calibration process for the IMU.

result.name: progress
result.desc: Calibration progress percentage (0-100).
